reviews.review_description: Now i will say, this game is sick and insanely fun. But not long ago i was chewing gum and had walked in front of the owner in disguise, now this made him think i kissed him which led to a ban for life, and the reason for ban was simply "weirdo". I recommend you learn how to correctly ban people and stop banning people for misunderstandings and laughs. Thanks for taking the time to read and i hope i get unbanned.

reviews.review_title: What is up with the dev?
reviews.review_description: I asked him to add magma rancher back and he said it's slop.. now I play clowns but I do not know a lot about the community so it'd be nice if someone could explain what they mean by slop also the DEV seems to ignore his fans or hates his fans that plays his game..but the game is good I guess.

developer_response.body: it is slop, slop means like adding random stuff to the game that isnt even official or real
